task_completion.description: Verify that CoppeliaSim is running with the obstacleAvoidanceAndIk scene.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The CoppeliaSim window is open, and the 3D viewport shows a robot manipulator and several spherical obstacles. The scene hierarchy should indicate 'obstacleAvoidanceAndIk'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the IK target dummy is selected for manipulation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The IK target dummy (often a small crosshair or specific object at the end-effector) is highlighted in the 3D view or selected in the scene hierarchy panel.

task_completion.description: Verify the robot's IK target dummy is moved to the first position [0.3, 0.3, 0.4].
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the position/translation dialog box showing coordinates close to X: 0.3, Y: 0.3, Z: 0.4, or the robot arm visibly extended into the corresponding positive X/Y quadrant of the workspace.

task_completion.description: Verify the robot's IK target dummy is moved to the second position [-0.3, 0.2, 0.3].
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the position/translation dialog box showing coordinates close to X: -0.3, Y: 0.2, Z: 0.3, or the robot arm visibly moved to the negative X quadrant. The final pose should reflect this position.

task_completion.description: Verify that the robot arm avoids collisions with the obstacle spheres.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Throughout the visible trajectory and in the final pose, the robot links and end-effector must not visually intersect or overlap with any of the obstacle spheres.

task_completion.description: Verify that a screenshot of the final robot pose is saved to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file manager window showing 'obstacle_nav_done.png' in '/home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/', a terminal command executing the screenshot save, or a CoppeliaSim export dialog confirming the exact path.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the actual CoppeliaSim application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show the CoppeliaSim GUI with its toolbars, scene hierarchy, and 3D viewport being actively used, rather than just viewing a static image or text file.

integrity.description: Ensure the robot arm actually moved in the simulation.
integrity.visual_evidence: Compare earlier and later screenshots to confirm the robot arm's joint angles and end-effector position physically changed in the 3D viewport, proving the IK solver was active.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent didn't mock the final screenshot file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should use a legitimate method to capture the screen or export the view (e.g., using an OS screenshot tool or CoppeliaSim's export function) rather than just renaming an unrelated image file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires moving the IK target dummy to exactly [0.3, 0.3, 0.4] and then to [-0.3, 0.2, 0.3]. The final screenshot must be saved to the exact path: /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/obstacle_nav_done.png.
